loginPage.title: Sign-in page
loginPage.description: Control the browser title for the sign-in page and the default destination after sign-in.

loginAndRegistration.title: Sign-in & registration
loginAndRegistration.description: Control available sign-in methods and email registration entry points.

humanVerification.title: Human verification
humanVerification.description: Enable Cloudflare Turnstile for email registration. Third-party sign-in is not affected.

bindingAndVerification.title: Binding & verification
bindingAndVerification.description: Control email verification, registration domain policy, and third-party identity linking.

loginSecurity.title: Sign-in security
loginSecurity.description: Control token lifetime, failed sign-in lockouts, and platform HTTP 429 rate limiting.

loginPageTitle.label: Browser title
loginPageTitle.description: Shown in the browser tab for the sign-in page.

loginDefaultNextPath.label: Default redirect path
loginDefaultNextPath.description: Default destination after sign-in when /login has no next parameter.

emailLoginEnabled.label: Email login
emailLoginEnabled.description: Allow users to sign in with email and password.

emailRegistrationEnabled.label: Email registration
emailRegistrationEnabled.description: Allow users to create accounts with email.

usernameLoginEnabled.label: Username login
usernameLoginEnabled.description: Allow users to sign in with username and password.

thirdPartyLoginEnabled.label: Third-party login
thirdPartyLoginEnabled.description: Enable and show configured OIDC / OAuth2 identity providers.

emailVerificationEnabled.label: Email verification
emailVerificationEnabled.description: Require an email verification code during email registration.

smtpHost.label: SMTP host
smtpHost.description: SMTP server address used to send registration verification codes.

smtpUsername.label: SMTP username
smtpUsername.description: SMTP login account, usually a full email address.

smtpPassword.label: SMTP password
smtpPassword.description: SMTP login password or application-specific password.

smtpFrom.label: Sender
smtpFrom.description: Sender shown in verification emails. Leave empty to use the SMTP username.

emailRegistrationAllowedDomains.label: Registration domain allowlist
emailRegistrationAllowedDomains.description: Allowed email domains for registration. Leave empty to allow all domains.

emailRegistrationBlockPlusAlias.label: Block plus aliases
emailRegistrationBlockPlusAlias.description: Block registration with + alias email addresses.

autoLinkVerifiedEmail.label: Auto-link same email
autoLinkVerifiedEmail.description: Automatically link a verified third-party email to an existing local account.

turnstileRegistrationEnabled.label: Registration human check
turnstileRegistrationEnabled.description: Require Cloudflare Turnstile for email registration. OIDC / OAuth2 sign-in does not require it.

turnstileSiteKey.label: Turnstile Site Key
turnstileSiteKey.description: Public Cloudflare Turnstile site key used by the sign-up form.

turnstileSecretKey.label: Turnstile Secret Key
turnstileSecretKey.description: Server-side Cloudflare Turnstile validation key. It is hidden after saving.

tokenTTLHours.label: Access token lifetime
tokenTTLHours.description: Access Token lifetime in hours. Range: 1-168.

refreshTokenTTLHours.label: Keep signed in
refreshTokenTTLHours.description: Refresh Token and session lifetime in hours. Range: 1-8760.

loginMaxFailures.label: Failure lock threshold
loginMaxFailures.description: Lock an account after this many consecutive failed sign-in attempts.

loginLockMinutes.label: Lock duration
loginLockMinutes.description: Lock duration in minutes after too many failed sign-in attempts.

rateLimitEnabled.label: Platform rate limit
rateLimitEnabled.description: When enabled, the platform returns HTTP 429. Disable it when Traefik, a gateway, or another outer layer handles rate limiting.

rateLimitRPM.label: User API rate limit
rateLimitRPM.description: Base per-minute request limit for signed-in user APIs. It has no effect when platform rate limiting is disabled.

publicAuthRateLimitRPM.label: Public auth rate limit
publicAuthRateLimitRPM.description: Base per-minute request limit for public login, registration, and token refresh APIs. It has no effect when platform rate limiting is disabled.

providerDialog.description: Client Secret is not shown after saving. Leave it empty while editing to keep the existing secret.

deleteDialog.title: Delete identity provider
deleteDialog.description: Deleting {name} removes its configuration and unlinks all accounts using it. This action cannot be undone.

forceDeleteDialog.title: Force delete identity provider
forceDeleteDialog.description: Some accounts depend only on this identity provider. After force deletion, those accounts can no longer sign in through it.

validation.defaultNextPath: The default redirect path must be an internal path, for example /chat.
validation.passwordLoginRequired: Before disabling username and email sign-in, enable third-party sign-in and make sure at least one administrator has a linked identity provider.
validation.invalidSMTPPort: SMTP port must be an integer between 1 and 65535.
validation.turnstileRegistrationRequired: Enable email registration before enabling Turnstile verification.

toast.signInAgain: Please sign in again before continuing.
toast.thirdPartyOnlyRequiresAdminBinding: Third-party-only sign-in is allowed only after an administrator has a linked third-party identity.
toast.registrationRequiresLogin: Registration can be enabled only after this identity provider allows login.
toast.providerControlSaveFailed: Failed to save identity provider control
toast.providerOrderSaveFailed: Failed to save identity provider order
